name: codex-fallback-router
description: Routes Codex Desktop requests to a configured Responses API after a confirmed ChatGPT usage-limit error.

interface.shortDescription: Automatic Responses API fallback for Codex Desktop
interface.longDescription: Runs a local loopback router that preserves the active Codex model and retries a turn against a configured Responses API only after a confirmed ChatGPT usage-limit error.
defaultPrompt: Run the fallback connectivity smoke test.
